title: OptiFree
description: A modpack replacing the need for OptiFine
body:
Not free as in free, but free as in without.
OptiFree is a modpack that replaces the need of OptiFine by using various mods, most of which are open-source and lead to better performace. They also do not alter the vanilla gameplay as much and are generally better.

Features include:
- Shaders
- Close OptiFine parity
- Zoom
- Capes
- Dynamic Lighting
